mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the unemployment rate signals stronger labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE declines >0.5pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and industrial production signals robust economic activity that increases corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of GDPC1 and INDPRO fails to produce positive 60-day returns in 50%+ of cases, or their combined predictive power (Rank IC) drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in inflation expectations, as measured by CPI, triggers central bank tightening that raises discount rates and reduces equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL rises >0.3pp over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production indicates stronger manufacturing activity that boosts corporate profits, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to produce positive 20-day returns in 50%+ of cases, or its predictive power (Rank IC) drops below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in housing starts signals stronger consumer demand and economic optimism that drives equity market performance, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where HOUST rises >10% over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in payroll employment and unemployment rate decline indicates a strong labor market that boosts consumer spending and corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint movement of PAYEMS and UNRATE fails to produce positive 20-day returns in 50%+ of cases, or their interaction effect (Rank IC) drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A monetary tightening cycle, indicated by rising Fed funds rates and inflation, raises borrowing costs and reduces corporate earnings growth potential, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS >4.5% and CPIAUCSL >2.0%.
